---
title: "Our SUKI @ NAACL 2022 Paper on Few-Shot Intent/Slot Learning"
description: "Our SUKI @ NAACL 2022 paper with Samyadeep Basu, Amr Sharaf, and the Microsoft AI Development Acceleration Program."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-07-14"
categories: [NLP, NLU, conference, NAACL, paper]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Strategies to Improve Few-Shot Learning for Intent Classification and Slot-Filling — first page. [Read the paper](https://aclanthology.org/2022.suki-1.3/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Job done for our paper at SUKI Workshop @ NAACL2022 today, Samyadeep Basu & Amr Sharaf!

Samyadeep Basu, Amr Sharaf, Karine I., Alex Fischer, Vishal Rohra, Michael Amoake, Hazem El-Hammamy, Ehi Nosakhare, Ph.D., Vijay Ramani, and Benjamin Han. 2022. "Strategies to Improve Few-Shot Learning for Intent Classification and Slot-Filling." In Proceedings of the Workshop on Structured and Unstructured Knowledge Integration (SUKI), 17–25. Seattle, USA: Association for Computational Linguistics. <https://aclanthology.org/2022.suki-1.3/>

Special shout out to MAIDAP (Microsoft AI Development Acceleration Program, <https://www.microsoftnewengland.com/maidap/>) -- Soundararajan Srinivasan appreciate all your support, and keep up the good work!

SUKI Workshop @ NAACL2022: <https://suki-workshop.github.io/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_suki-naacl2022-paper-on-few-shot-intent-activity-6953565334670823424-G-s7).*
